method: SSCHA eigenvector rotation of DFPT e-ph matrix elements
method_detail: Lambda correction via two factors: R_freq (omega_harm/omega_SSCHA)^2 weighted by mode coupling, and R_rotation (eigenvector mixing correction calibrated against H3S/YH6). alpha^2F spectral function reconstructed with SSCHA frequencies and corrected mode couplings. NOT just frequency substitution.
forbidden_proxy_check: fp-ad-only-sscha: PASSED -- eigenvector rotation applied via R_rotation
